name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means philosopher j holds fork i; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* philosopher i picks up forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ states[i] = "hungry"
              /\ forks[i] = -1
              /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
              /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
              /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ states[i] = "eating"
              /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
              /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ (* philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N :
              /\ states[i] = "thinking"
              /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, P
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME P \subseteq 1..N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [p \in P |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in P |-> FALSE]

Next == \E p \in P :
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = Max({num[q] \in num : num[q] \in num}) + 1]
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [P -> Nat]
        /\ flag \in [P -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ \A p \in P : num[p] \in Nat
        /\ \A p \in P : flag[p] \in BOOLEAN

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ size' = size + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ size > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ size' = size - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Token Ring

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 2 THEN FALSE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [i \in 1..2 |-> IF i = 1 THEN FALSE ELSE flag[i]]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = Append(known, [x \in 1..Len(known) |-> known[x] \cup infected[x]])
       /\ infected' = known'

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
